# Rosen Velikov

> AI Infrastructure Engineer — Production Voice AI, Distributed Systems, Carrier-Grade Security

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria (EU)
- **Open to:** Remote roles in EU
- **Email:** rosen.st.velikov@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://djok.github.io/me
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/rosenvelikov
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/djok
- **X:** https://x.com/RosenVelikov

## Professional Summary

Engineer and entrepreneur with 25 years building carrier-grade systems — from telecom infrastructure serving 70K+ households to a production AI voice-to-text platform with GPU inference, distributed service mesh, and full observability. Security-first mindset forged in telecom: zero-trust networking, multi-layer authentication, fault-tolerant architectures that handle money, personal data, and 24/7 uptime. Now applying the same production discipline to applied AI.

**Core stack:** Rust · Python · Go · Docker · NATS · Azure · Cloudflare · Prometheus/Grafana/Loki

## Target Roles

1. **AI Infrastructure Engineer** — Production AI systems, GPU inference, model serving
2. **Voice AI Engineer** — ASR deployment, speech pipelines, real-time processing
3. **Distributed Systems Engineer** — Service mesh, observability, carrier-grade reliability

## Key Achievement: Dictaro — Production Voice-to-Text Platform

Built and shipped a production distributed voice-to-text platform from scratch:

- **Rust Client:** 65 source files, egui, tokio, WASAPI, streaming VAD (Silero via ONNX), FLAC compression, 25 European languages, Microsoft Store distribution
- **ASR Server:** FastAPI on NVIDIA DGX Spark, Canary-1B-v2, 6 switchable LLMs via vLLM/SGLang
- **Licensing API:** Go, OAuth2 x3, JWT RS256, Stripe subscriptions, PostgreSQL on Azure
- **Infrastructure:** 20+ Docker services, NATS service mesh, Cloudflare Tunnels (zero-trust), Prometheus + Grafana + Loki

## Core Competencies

- **Voice AI & ASR:** Production ASR model deployment, VAD, LLM post-processing, A/B model testing
- **Distributed Systems:** NATS service mesh, multi-machine Docker orchestration, health monitoring
- **GPU Infrastructure:** NVIDIA DGX Spark, vLLM/SGLang model serving, GPU monitoring (DCGM)
- **Carrier-Grade Security:** Zero-trust networking, OAuth2, JWT RS256, NKey authorization, PCI compliance
- **Full Observability:** Prometheus + Grafana (4 dashboards, 46+ panels) + Loki + Promtail
- **Telecom Infrastructure:** FTTH/GPON, SDH, 500+ km fiber networks, OSS/BSS platforms

## Tech Stack

### Languages & Frameworks
- Rust (primary — egui, tokio, serde, tungstenite, WASAPI bindings)
- Python (FastAPI, vLLM, NVIDIA NeMo/Canary, ONNX, Prometheus client)
- Go (Gin, pgx, JWT, OAuth2, Stripe SDK, NATS client, Prometheus client)
- JavaScript/TypeScript (Astro, Docusaurus, Node.js)

### AI / ML
- ASR model deployment (NVIDIA Canary-1B-v2, Gemma4)
- LLM inference at scale (vLLM/SGLang — Qwen, Gemma, BgGPT)
- Voice Activity Detection (Silero VAD, ONNX runtime)
- A/B model testing and evaluation
- NVIDIA DGX Spark GPU infrastructure

### Infrastructure & DevOps
- Docker & Docker Compose (20+ services, multi-machine)
- NATS service mesh (request/reply, pub/sub, NKey authorization)
- Azure (VM, PostgreSQL, Blob Storage, Log Analytics)
- Cloudflare (Tunnels, Pages, DNS, Turnstile CAPTCHA)
- GitHub Actions CI/CD (14+ workflows, self-hosted runners)
- Prometheus + Grafana + Loki + Promtail

### Security & Resilience
- Zero-trust networking (Cloudflare Tunnels — no exposed ports)
- Multi-layer authentication (OAuth2 x3, JWT RS256, NATS NKey)
- Stripe PCI-compliant billing integration
- Rate limiting and quota enforcement
- SHA256-verified software distribution
- 25 years of telecom-grade uptime discipline

## Work Experience

### Dictaro (2025–present) — Founder & Lead Engineer
Production distributed voice-to-text platform. Rust client + Python ASR server + Go licensing API + 20+ Docker services + NATS service mesh + full observability.

### EVO.bg (2003–present) — Co-Founder & General Manager
Next-generation broadband and TV operator. 70K+ connected households, 500+ km fiber, Bulgaria's first alternative SDH link (2004). Partially sold to mobile operator.

### clouWay (2009–present) — Co-Founder
Carrier-grade OSS/BSS platform for fixed telecom operators. Billing, customer care, online rating & charging, resource management. In continuous production since 2009.

### Earlier Career
- Mobiltel (now A1 Bulgaria) — Bulgaria's leading mobile operator
- Megalan Network Ltd. — network engineering

## Education

Technical background in telecommunications and IT.

- **Bulgarian:** Native
- **English:** Professional working proficiency

Senior remote role in EU to:
- Build and operate production AI infrastructure
- Apply carrier-grade reliability to AI systems
- Lead distributed systems architecture
